text: Find a comfortable position. Allow your body to settle. Close your eyes when you are ready.
Take a slow, deep breath in through your nose for four counts. Hold gently for two. Exhale through your mouth for six counts.
Again. Inhale deeply. Feel your chest and belly expand. And release. Let the tension dissolve with every exhale.
With each breath, you sink a little deeper into relaxation. There is nothing you need to do right now. Nowhere to be. Simply rest.
Imagine yourself standing at the edge of a calm lake. The water is still and clear. The air is fresh and cool. You feel completely safe here.
With every breath, the surface of the lake becomes more still. And so do you. Calm. Clear. Present.
You are at peace. Your mind is clear. Your body is at ease.
You carry this stillness with you wherever you go.
Begin to bring your awareness back to the room. Gently wiggle your fingers and toes. When you feel ready, open your eyes.
